series_metadata.series_title: Workforce Development Equipment and Facility Grant
series_metadata.series_description: Includes records related to the Workforce Development Equipment and Facility Grant. These records include, but are not limited to: Requests for Proposals, proposals, reports, and award letters.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 3 years following the end of the grant cycle, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 3 years following the end of the grant cycle, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
